g.title: CONFIG_SETUP
g.text: T_lidar_imu: [tx, ty, tz, qx, qy, qz, qw]
System auto-fills all GLIM JSON config files

g.title: VALIDATOR
g.text: 10-second bag sample — checks topics and data rates

g.title: HUMAN_REVIEW
g.text: Fix user_config.yaml if needed and re-run config setup

g.title: EXISTING_DUMP
g.text: User enters existing dump directory path

g.title: CONFIG_REVIEW
g.text: Config Review — Confirm before running GLIM
Confirm? [y/n] → n: opens config path, waits

g.title: MODE1
g.text: Iridescence 3D viewer opens (watch map build live)

g.title: MAP_EDITOR
g.text: Remove noise, fix loop closures, clean artefacts

g.title: MERGE_EDITOR
g.text: Save merged result → enter new dump path

g.title: EXPORT
g.text: Python reads binary submaps directly | No GUI | No PLY step

g.title: POI
g.text: Click points on 3D map → register POIs | YAML auto-saved

g.title: OUTPUTS
g.text: POI YAML points of interest (if registered)

g.title: DASH_PIPELINE
g.text: Same pipeline steps 1–9 via web forms
